transcription.text: Discover a dermatologist's way to transform your skin. Refinish Microdermabrasion Kit from L'Oréal with the same crystals dermatologists use to polish and resurface skin in just two steps, two minutes, two times a week. Refinish Microdermabrasion Kit from L'Oréal Paris.

segments.text: Discover a dermatologist's way to transform your skin.

to polish and resurface skin in just two steps, two minutes, two times a week.
